judge.rationale: The candidate submission is written entirely in Dafny syntax, not Python. It cannot be executed as a Python module, does not define a Python class, has no threading primitives (no locks, no threading.Lock), and does not implement the required Python interface (BoundedCounter with increment, total, snapshot methods returning Python types). The code is syntactically invalid Python and would raise a SyntaxError immediately. While the Dafny logic captures some of the correct semantics (bounds checking, counter tracking), it completely fails to satisfy the functional requirements in the target language, is not thread-safe in any Python sense, and represents a fundamental category error in the submission.
